notes: Cool palette — Rescan, Check for updates, the toggle icon set (incl. loop default), and the version chip all use the theme's blue as their default state. Active loop modes (Loop one, Loop folder) still flip to amber so engaged states pop. Resume-after-update — if audio is playing when you tap the green update chip, the post-reload init seeks back to the same playhead position (and best-effort autoplay) so the update is invisible mid-listening. State persists for 60 seconds across the reload, then clears.
